---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a comprehensive idea, enhancement, or new feature for this project
title: '[FEAT] - Brief, descriptive title of the feature'
labels: 'enhancement, triage'
assignees: ''

---

## 📌 Overview
<!-- A quick, high-level summary of what you are proposing. -->
* **Feature Name:** 
* **Target Audience/User Persona:** (e.g., Admins, End-users, Developers)
* **Impact Level:** [ ] Low | [ ] Medium | [ ] High

---

## 🛑 Problem Statement
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. 
> *Ex. I am always frustrated when [user action] because [current limitation], resulting in [negative outcome].*

---

## 💡 Proposed Solution
**Describe the solution you'd like to see.**
A detailed description of the ideal outcome, functionality, and how it addresses the problem statement above.

### User Story
```text
As a [type of user], 
I want to [perform an action], 
so that [I can achieve a specific goal/benefit].
